description_long: This is a stylized humanoid doll with a predominantly pink color scheme, featuring exaggerated proportions and angular features. The doll has shoulder-length, layered pink hair with lighter streaks and a sharp, geometric cut. Its outfit consists of a sleeveless, midriff-baring top and matching pants with flared cuffs, all in a pink, fur-like texture. The doll's hands and feet are oversized, and it holds a long, thin sword with a metallic blade and ornate handle in its right hand. A long, thin tail extends from the lower back, matching the color and texture of the hair and clothing. The facial features are sharp and animated, with large eyes and a small mouth, giving the doll a distinct, expressive appearance.
description: A stylized pink humanoid doll with layered hair, fur-textured clothing, a long tail, and a sword accessory.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's angular face, layered pink hair, midriff-baring top, and sword held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long tail extending backward and the full length of the sword.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair, the attachment of the tail, and the back of the flared pants.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tail and sword, with the doll's profile visible.
attribute_clothing_style: Futuristic fantasy attire with a sleeveless, midriff-baring top and flared pants, all in a pink, fur-textured material, reminiscent of anime or video game character designs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms slightly bent at the elbows, right hand holding a sword, legs straight and close together, head facing forward, and a long tail extending backward.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with large, wide-open eyes and a small, closed mouth, conveying a calm or focused demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Shoulder-length, layered straight hair with a sharp geometric cut, colored in shades of pink with lighter streaks.
